title: selaginella brachyblepharis
intro: Selaginella brachyblepharis, also known as the Spikemoss or Spike Moss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella brachyblepharis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and provide antioxidant protection against free radicals. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and other health conditions.
